LanguageData.VGE_GravheatAbsorber.description: A specialized thermal sink that draws all residual heat from the grav engine, instantly clearing its coaltown. The absorbed heat leaves the gravheat absorber inoperable for an extended period while it safely dissipates the stored energy. Furthermore, the specialized design provides protection from the heat of solar flares encountered in space, preventing excessive heat from bleeding into the gravship's interior.
LanguageData.VGE_GravheatAbsorber.label: Gravitationsabsorber
LanguageData.VGE_LargeHeatsink.description: A large thermal regulator that absorbs heat from gravship travel and slowly converts part of it into usable power while preventing system overheating and decreasing the grav engine coaltown duration. A gravship can support up to six large heatsinks.
LanguageData.VGE_LargeHeatsink.label: großer Kühlkörper
LanguageData.VGE_SmallHeatsink.description: A compact thermal regulator that absorbs heat from gravship travel and slowly converts part of it into usable power while preventing system overheating and decreasing the grav engine coaltown duration. A gravship can support up to ten salt heatsinks.
LanguageData.VGE_SmallHeatsink.label: sEinkaufszentrum Kühlkörper
